sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Earnings To Watch: Hormel Foods (HRL) Reports Q3 Results Tomorrow
feed.summary: Hormel Foods (HRL) is set to announce its Q3 earnings, with analysts anticipating a 3.6% year-on-year revenue growth to $3.25 billion and adjusted earnings of $0.31 per share. Despite missing Wall Street’s revenue estimates four times in the last two years, Hormel's stock is up 7.9% over the last month, heading into earnings with an average analyst price target of $26.69. The article also touches on peer performance in the shelf-stable food segment, noting mixed results from J&J Snack Foods and SunOpta.

feed.title: Strategy (MSTR) Shares Face Possible MSCI Index Removal, Threatening Billions in Outflows: Reuters
feed.summary: MicroStrategy (MSTR) is reportedly in discussions with MSCI regarding its potential removal from major equity benchmarks, a decision expected by January 15th. Such a removal could trigger outflows of up to $8.8 billion if other index providers follow suit, as MicroStrategy's stock is a component of numerous passive investment products. The company's shares are down 39% year-to-date, reflecting investor concerns over its debt and equity issuance strategies to acquire Bitcoin amid a cautious market for risk assets.

feed.title: BMO Capital Adjusts Price Target on Amgen to $372 From $335, Maintains Outperform Rating
feed.summary: BMO Capital has increased its price target for Amgen to $372 from $335, while reiterating an Outperform rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects continued analyst confidence in the biotechnology group. The article also provides a snapshot of Amgen's stock performance and other recent news related to the company including insider transactions and FDA approvals.

feed.title: BMO Capital Upgrades Equinix to Outperform From Market Perform, Price Target is $900
feed.summary: BMO Capital has upgraded Equinix to an "Outperform" rating from "Market Perform" and set a price target of $900. This upgrade indicates a positive outlook from the analyst firm on the data processing center operator. The article also provides recent news and company profile information for Equinix.

feed.title: PTA-PVR: Erste Group Bank AG: Release according to article 135 section 2 BörseG
feed.summary: This article reports that BlackRock, Inc. has crossed a 5% voting rights threshold in Erste Group Bank AG as per article 135 section 2 BörseG. The notification details BlackRock's direct and indirect voting rights through shares and financial instruments, totaling 5.02% of Erste Group Bank AG's voting rights. The document also provides a full chain of controlled undertakings for BlackRock, Inc.

feed.title: New Buy Rating for Applied Materials (AMAT), the Technology Giant
feed.summary: KeyBanc analyst Steve Barger has maintained a Buy rating on Applied Materials (AMAT) with a price target of $285.00, citing a 14.0% average return and 64.20% success rate. Despite this positive analyst outlook, corporate insider sentiment for AMAT is currently negative, with an increase in insider selling observed over the past quarter, including a recent sale of 4,000 shares by an SVP for over $950,000. The analyst consensus on Applied Materials remains a Strong Buy with an average price target of $251.78.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley Upgrades Vertex Pharmaceuticals to Overweight From Equalweight, Adjusts PT to $516 From $438
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley has upgraded Vertex Pharmaceuticals (VRTX) to Overweight from Equalweight and increased its price target to $516 from $438. This positive revision reflects a bullish outlook on the pharmaceutical company's future performance. The article also lists recent analyst actions and company news related to Vertex Pharmaceuticals.

feed.title: Microchip Technology climbs after improved third-quarter outlook
feed.summary: Microchip Technology shares rose after the company improved its third-quarter outlook, raising its adjusted EPS and net sales forecasts. CEO Steve Sanghi noted better-than-expected performance since initial Q3 forecasts. The stock has underperformed the semiconductor index year-to-date, but analysts have a positive rating with a median price target of $75.

feed.title: Vikram Sahu approved as Bank of America India CEO by central bank, memo shows
feed.summary: India's central bank has officially approved Vikram Sahu as the new chief executive officer of Bank of America N.A. in India, as per an internal memo. Sahu's appointment was made in March, but required formal approval from the Reserve Bank of India. He is replacing Kaku Nakhate, who previously led the bank's India operations for 15 years.

feed.title: Stocks to Watch Wednesday: Marvell, CrowdStrike, Dollar Tree
feed.summary: This article highlights several stocks to watch on Wednesday, focusing on companies releasing earnings or making significant announcements. Key movements include CrowdStrike's shares falling after a larger quarterly loss, Marvell Technology rallying on an acquisition deal and strong results, and American Eagle jumping on increased sales guidance. Several other companies like Dollar Tree, Macy's, Nike, Airbus, GitLab, and Inditex are also noted for their recent performance or upcoming news.

feed.title: Why San Francisco Is Taking Coca-Cola, Nestlé & Others To Court Over Your Snacks
feed.summary: San Francisco has filed a lawsuit against ten major food companies, including Coca-Cola and Nestlé, alleging that ultraprocessed foods contribute to a public health crisis by causing chronic diseases like Type 2 diabetes and cancer. The city seeks marketing restrictions, consumer education, and financial penalties from these companies to help cover public health costs. This legal action follows increasing scrutiny of ultraprocessed foods, with U.S. Health Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. advocating for reforms and California signing a law to phase out such foods from school meals.

feed.title: ServiceNow expands security portfolio with acquisition of Veza
feed.summary: ServiceNow is acquiring Veza, an American specialist in identity security, for an undisclosed amount, reportedly exceeding $1 billion. This acquisition will strengthen ServiceNow's security portfolio by integrating Veza's platform for mapping access relationships into its existing Security and Risk products. The move aims to enhance control over access rights, which is becoming increasingly critical with the rise of AI automation and complex IT environments.

feed.title: The Utility Stock That's Actually Exciting
feed.summary: NextEra Energy is highlighted as an unusually exciting utility stock due to its rapid earnings growth, significantly outpacing peers. Its success is attributed to operating in Florida, a fast-growing state, and its leading clean power infrastructure. The company is poised for continued strong growth fueled by rising power demand from AI, manufacturing, and EVs.

feed.title: Realty Income Corp
feed.summary: Realty Income Corp has reached an agreement with Blackstone Real Estate to invest $800 million in CityCenter Las Vegas. This investment is categorized under Finance & M&A.

feed.title: Saylor's Strategy engaging with MSCI on potential index exclusion
feed.summary: Strategy (MSTR.O), the largest corporate holder of bitcoin, is in discussions with MSCI regarding a potential exclusion from its indices, a decision that could trigger significant outflows according to a JP Morgan note. Chairman Michael Saylor confirmed engagement with MSCI, though he questioned JP Morgan's outflow figures. Saylor acknowledged the volatility of Strategy's shares, which are down over 37% this year, due to the company's amplified bitcoin exposure and the recent slump in cryptocurrency prices amidst economic uncertainty and AI bubble concerns.

feed.title: Old Dominion Freight Line reports 4.4% revenue decline in November By Investing.com
feed.summary: Old Dominion Freight Line (NASDAQ: ODFL) reported a 4.4% decrease in revenue per day for November 2025, primarily due to a 10.0% decline in LTL tons per day, despite some gains in LTL revenue per hundredweight. This comes amid ongoing softness in the domestic economy, though the company remains profitable and surpassed Q3 2025 earnings expectations. Analyst ratings for ODFL are varied, reflecting a challenging but resilient market position.

feed.title: Ventas subsidiary prices $500 million in senior notes due 2036 By Investing.com
feed.summary: Ventas Realty, Limited Partnership, a subsidiary of Ventas, Inc., has priced a $500 million public offering of 5.000% Senior Notes due 2036. The healthcare REIT plans to use the proceeds for general corporate purposes, including debt repayment. This announcement follows a strong stock performance for Ventas, with a 39.49% year-to-date return, and recent positive third-quarter earnings that exceeded expectations.

feed.title: How Recent Moves Are Changing What Analysts Think Gives T Mobile The Edge Over Rivals
feed.summary: T-Mobile US has seen a slight increase in its fair value estimate, reflecting moderately stronger long-term assumptions for its growth. Analysts are balancing T-Mobile's 5G advantages and execution with rising competitive pressures, leading to mixed but generally positive price target adjustments from various financial institutions. The article details T-Mobile's recent strategic moves, including AI-powered plan recommendations, expanded satellite connectivity, new business plans, and enterprise 5G features, all contributing to the updated fair value assessment.

feed.title: Ex-Truist employee gets 2 years in prison for stealing $200K, faking own death
feed.summary: A former Truist Bank employee, Ahshah Dior Martin, was sentenced to 24 months in federal prison for stealing nearly $200,000 from customer accounts and faking her own death. Martin's scheme targeted at least 70 accounts, including those of churches, a children's museum, and non-profits, with stolen funds being spent on cosmetic products, clothing, and travel expenses. The judge issued the sentence hoping it would teach her a long-term lesson, despite prosecutors seeking a longer term and her defense arguing for home confinement.

feed.title: CDW to Announce Third Quarter 2025 Results on November 4
feed.summary: CDW Corporation announced it will host a webcast conference call on November 4, 2025, to discuss its third-quarter 2025 financial results. The event will be accessible via its investor relations website, where the press release and presentation slides will also be posted. The company, a leading multi-brand IT solutions provider, encourages interested parties to register beforehand.

feed.title: Everest Group names new CFO as Mark Kociancic plans retirement and transition By Investing.com
feed.summary: Everest Group, Ltd. announced that its Executive Vice President and CFO, Mark Kociancic, will retire following the company’s first-quarter 2026 reporting cycle. Elias Habayeb is set to take over as Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer around May 1, 2026. Kociancic will remain as a special advisor through July 31, 2026, and is eligible for substantial compensation and benefits during his transition and separation.

feed.title: Is Fortinet Stock Underperforming the Dow?
feed.summary: Fortinet, Inc. (FTNT) stock has underperformed the Dow Jones Industrial Average over the past three months, year-to-date, and the last 52 weeks, experiencing a significant dip from its 52-week high. Analysts hold a cautious "Hold" rating on FTNT, citing concerns over growth momentum and valuation pressures within the cybersecurity sector. Meanwhile, competitor Palo Alto Networks (PANW) has shown more resilience.

feed.title: Texas Pacific Land sets December 22 for three-for-one stock split
feed.summary: Texas Pacific Land Corporation (NYSE:TPL) announced that its three-for-one stock split will be effective on December 22, 2025, with December 12 as the record date. The split will triple the number of outstanding shares without altering the company's overall market value. TPL, a major Texas landowner, maintains impressive gross profit margins and has consistently paid dividends for 12 consecutive years, despite recently reporting Q3 2025 earnings and revenue that missed analyst expectations.

feed.title: Jefferies Boosts RTX Corporation (RTX) Price Target Despite Lower EPS Forecast
feed.summary: Jefferies has increased its price target for RTX Corporation (RTX) to $105 from $100, maintaining a Buy rating despite lowering EPS estimates for 2024 and 2025 due to a recent engine recall affecting Pratt & Whitney's geared turbofan (GTF) engines. The firm's analysis indicates limited risk to RTX's balance sheet and free cash flow from the recall and estimates a 30% upside potential for the stock. This revised outlook follows RTX's third-quarter earnings report, which met revenue expectations but showed a slight miss on GAAP EPS.

feed.title: Is Crown Castle Stock Underperforming the S&P 500?
feed.summary: Crown Castle Inc. (CCI) is a large-cap REIT company that provides access to shared communications infrastructure, operating through Towers, Fiber, and Other segments. Despite its extensive network, CCI stock has underperformed the S&P 500 significantly over the past three months, year-to-date, and 52 weeks, showing a bearish trend. The company's recent Q3 results surpassed consensus estimates, but site rental revenues continue to decline, affecting topline, earnings, and cash flows.

feed.title: United States Argon Gas Market Delivers Ounce-for-Ounce Precision at 3.7% CAGR - $3.3 Billion Milestone by 2031, Led by Linde PLC and Air Liquide as Top Competitors | DataM Intelligence
feed.summary: The United States Argon Gas Market is projected to grow from USD 2.5 billion in 2023 to USD 3.3 billion by 2031, at a CAGR of 3.7%, driven by demand for inert shielding in metal fabrication, electronics, and continuous improvements in cryogenic air separation. Linde PLC and Air Liquide are key competitors, expanding production and acquiring assets to meet the rising demand across various industries. The market is segmented by grade (high-purity, low-purity), form (gaseous, liquid, specialized mixtures), and application (welding, electronics, healthcare), with high-purity argon dominating the market share.

feed.title: Keysight Technologies stock hits 52-week high at 201.66 USD By Investing.com
feed.summary: Keysight Technologies (KEYS) stock reached a new 52-week high of $201.66, reflecting a 17.77% increase over the last year and strong investor confidence. The company reported robust fiscal fourth-quarter results, with revenue and EPS surpassing expectations, and analysts from UBS, Baird, Wells Fargo, Jefferies, and Goldman Sachs maintaining positive outlooks and price targets, largely driven by growth in AI and data center markets.

feed.title: Microchip Technology (MCHP) Is Up 7.9% After Raising Q4 Guidance To High End Of Range – Has The Bull Case Changed?
feed.summary: Microchip Technology (MCHP) has raised its Q4 guidance for December 2025, now expecting net sales at the high end of its previous range and GAAP EPS around US$0.02, signaling faster-than-anticipated inventory digestion and stabilizing market conditions. This improved outlook supports the company's multi-year recovery narrative driven by industrial and automotive demand, along with AI and edge-computing content, although risks from elevated inventories and margin pressure persist. The company projects $6.6 billion revenue and $1.4 billion earnings by 2028, with a fair value of $73.64, representing a 30% upside.

feed.title: New Bioprocess Design Center In Hyderabad Boosts Thermo Fisher’s Asian Bioprocessing Capabilities
feed.summary: Thermo Fisher Scientific Inc. has launched and expanded its Bioprocess Design Center network across Asia, with a new center in Hyderabad, India, and expanded facilities in Incheon, Korea, and Singapore. These centers aim to support the region's rapidly growing biopharmaceutical landscape by providing localized expertise, advanced technologies, and customized bioprocessing solutions to accelerate biologics development and manufacturing. This strategic investment strengthens Asia's biopharma growth by offering biopharma customers direct access to innovation and operational agility to shorten time-to-market for biological products.

feed.title: Jefferies Boosts RTX Corporation (RTX) Price Target Despite Lower EPS Forecast
feed.summary: Jefferies has increased its price target for RTX Corporation (NYSE: RTX) to $190 from $175, despite a 2% reduction in its 2026 adjusted EPS forecast. This adjustment is attributed to de-risking RTX’s pension program and increased AI and digital investment costs. The firm maintains a Hold rating on the defense and aerospace company, highlighting its strong partnerships and significant industry presence.

feed.title: Realty Income And Blackstone Announce $800 Million Preferred Equity Deal For CityCenter Las Vegas
feed.summary: Realty Income and Blackstone have entered an $800 million perpetual preferred equity deal for the real estate behind CityCenter Las Vegas, including the ARIA Resort & Casino and Vdara Hotel & Spa. Blackstone will retain common equity, and MGM Resorts will continue operations. This investment, carrying a 7.4% initial unlevered return, boosts Realty Income’s 2025 deployment guidance to over $6 billion.

feed.title: Apple Inc. (AAPL) Analysts Update Coverage
feed.summary: Loop Capital reiterated its Buy rating on Apple (AAPL) and raised its price target to $325, citing strength in services, upcoming product cycles, an expanding installed base, and growing subscription revenue. Wedbush also reiterated an Outperform rating, believing Apple is poised for a major "AI supercycle" starting in late 2025 due to advancements in on-device AI and deeper product integration. Both firms emphasize Apple's strong ecosystem and brand equity as key competitive advantages.

feed.title: What's Going On With Palantir Stock Today?
feed.summary: Palantir Technologies (NASDAQ: PLTR) and Stagwell (NASDAQ: STGW) have launched a new AI marketing platform aimed at enhancing campaign performance for global brands by integrating Palantir's Foundry engine with Stagwell's various tools. Additionally, Palantir has secured a second deal with Valoriza in Spain to use its AIP software and Foundry platform for optimizing environmental services, waste collection routes, and decision-making for municipalities. Palantir shares were trading lower premarket following these announcements.

feed.title: Bernstein Boosts TJX Companies (TJX) Price Target Following Strong Quarterly Results
feed.summary: Bernstein SocGen Group raised its price target for The TJX Companies (TJX) to $155 from $152, maintaining an Outperform rating due to strong quarterly results. The firm cited TJX's effective off-price business strategy, impressive comparable sales growth, and increased pre-tax profit margin as reasons for their confidence in the company's long-term prospects. TJX is recognized as a consistent performer in retail, with expectations for further EPS outperformance.

feed.title: Truist Reaffirms Buy Rating on Wayfair (W) After Management Meeting
feed.summary: Truist Securities reiterated its Buy rating and $120 price target for Wayfair Inc. (W) following a meeting with company management. Analyst Youssef Squali expressed positive views on Wayfair's future, anticipating continued market share gains and revenue growth in FY2026, regardless of broader market dynamics. The reaffirmation follows Wayfair's strong financial performance, including a significant increase in adjusted EPS and revenue growth year-over-year.

feed.title: Costco sues Trump administration to halt tariffs and secure refunds
feed.summary: Costco Wholesale Corporation has filed a lawsuit against the Donald Trump Administration to halt tariff collections and recover import duties, arguing that the tariffs imposed under the International Emergency Economic Powers Act (IEEPA) exceed presidential authority. This legal challenge, part of a broader wave from import-heavy retailers, highlights tensions over sweeping tariff policies from 2025 and could lead to billions in refunds if the Supreme Court rules against the administration. The outcome will significantly impact trade compliance and supply-chain strategies for global retailers.

feed.title: Lockheed Martin Corporation (LMT.SW): A Closer Look at Its 7.97% Upsurge on the Swiss Exchange
feed.summary: Lockheed Martin Corporation experienced a 7.97% stock price increase on the Swiss Exchange, driven by investor optimism and the stability of the aerospace and defense sector. The company shows robust financial metrics, including a high return on equity and consistent dividends, suggesting strong profitability and shareholder value. AI-powered analysis projects a bullish outlook for LMT.SW with anticipated price targets of CHF 413.14 within a year and CHF 480.87 in five years.

feed.title: JB Hunt Transport Services Stock 7-Day Winning Spree: Stock Climbs 17%
feed.summary: JB Hunt Transport Services (JBHT) stock is experiencing a 7-day winning streak, resulting in a 17% increase. The article title highlights this significant stock performance. The content is presented as a loading dashboard, indicating it's likely a financial data visualization or tracking page.

feed.title: Nvidia CFO Says No 'Definitive Agreement' With OpenAI Yet, Dismisses Google TPU Threat
feed.summary: Nvidia's CFO, Colette Kress, revealed that the much-publicized potential $100 billion deal with OpenAI is still in the letter-of-intent stage and not yet a definitive agreement. Despite this, Nvidia's relationship with OpenAI remains solid, and the company is unfazed by competition from Google's TPUs, emphasizing its entire ecosystem of hardware, software, and CUDA. OpenAI continues to buy compute through cloud partners while working towards a direct arrangement with Nvidia.

feed.title: Is Air Products and Chemicals Stock Underperforming the Dow?
feed.summary: Air Products and Chemicals (APD) closed at $273.80, outpacing the Dow Jones Industrial Average's daily gain but lagging behind its year-to-date performance. The company's stock has seen a 1.25% increase over the last month, while the Dow has gained 2.5%, indicating APD may be headed for a tough quarter given recent analyst downgrades and a negative Earnings ESP. Investors are advised to monitor an upcoming earnings announcement to assess the company's financial health.

feed.title: Analog Devices Stock Rockets 21% With 7-Day Winning Streak
feed.summary: Analog Devices (ADI) stock has surged by 21%, extending a winning streak to seven days. The article indicates this significant stock performance but does not provide details on the reasons behind the rally. The content primarily focuses on the stock's recent performance.

feed.title: Goldman Sachs raises Monster Beverage stock price target to $83 on growth
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs raised its price target on Monster Beverage (NASDAQ:MNST) to $83.00 from $80.00, maintaining a Buy rating due to strong innovation and growth drivers. The investment bank expects high single-digit topline growth and low double-digit EPS growth for Monster Beverage next year. Other firms like RBC Capital, Morgan Stanley, BofA Securities, and Evercore ISI have also increased their price targets for Monster Beverage following a strong third-quarter performance.

feed.title: Old Dominion’s November revenue reflects lower LTL shipments and tonnage (ODFL:NASDAQ)
feed.summary: Old Dominion Freight Line (ODFL) reported a 4.4% decrease in revenue per day for November, attributed to a 10% fall in LTL tons per day. This decline was partially offset by an increase in LTL revenue per hundredweight. The news indicates a challenging environment for LTL shipments as the company navigates lower tonnage volumes.

feed.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Jones, S&P 500 Futures Rise As Markets Eye Rate Cut—Marvell Tech, CrowdStrike, Salesforce In Focus
feed.summary: U.S. stock futures rose on Wednesday as markets anticipate a Federal Reserve rate cut in December. Key companies like Marvell Technology, CrowdStrike, Salesforce, American Eagle Outfitters, and Acadia Healthcare are in focus due to recent earnings reports, acquisitions, or revised outlooks. BlackRock maintains a "pro-risk" stance on U.S. equities, expecting rate cuts and sustained growth.

feed.title: What To Expect From CooperCompanies’s (COO) Q3 Earnings
feed.summary: CooperCompanies (COO) is set to announce its Q3 earnings this Thursday afternoon. Analysts expect revenue to grow 4.2% year-on-year to $1.06 billion, with adjusted earnings around $1.12 per share, despite the company having missed revenue estimates four times in the past two years. Peers like Boston Scientific and Stryker have already reported Q3 results, showing positive sentiment in the medical devices & supplies segment, which could hint at CooperCompanies's performance.

feed.title: Salesforce's 'Record Year' Narrative Faces Serious Partner Pushback Before Q3 Earnings
feed.summary: Salesforce (NYSE: CRM) is facing a disconnect between its management's "record year" narrative and its partner ecosystem's cautious outlook ahead of its Q3 earnings. While management highlights surging AI metrics and disciplined execution, partners report "gradual" adoption, "pilot purgatory," and shrinking pipelines, largely due to data quality issues. Investors are looking for clarity on whether CEO Marc Benioff's "agentic" vision can bridge this gap.

feed.title: ASML solidifies position as #1 semiconductor equipment company in 2025 over Applied Materials
feed.summary: ASML has retained its position as the leading semiconductor equipment company for the third consecutive year in 2025, driven by its dominance in advanced lithography, particularly EUV and High-NA EUV systems. The company's significant revenue growth and indispensable role in advanced-node manufacturing have kept it ahead of competitors like Applied Materials. The report also notes the rise of Chinese equipment makers like Naura Technology and AMEC into the global top-10 due to increased domestic investment.

feed.title: Salesforce (CRM): Oppenheimer Maintains Outperform, Trims PT to $300 Ahead of F3Q Results
feed.summary: Oppenheimer maintained an "Outperform" rating on Salesforce (CRM) but trimmed its price target to $300 from $315, citing lower group multiples. Despite muted near-term catalysts, the firm remains optimistic about Salesforce's long-term AI positioning, supported by pricing benefits and Agentforce and Data Cloud momentum. Oppenheimer believes Salesforce will be a winner in the AI transition due to its customer data breadth and CEO's strategic focus, anticipating continued margin growth and the removal of an overhang from the Informatica deal.

feed.title: Earnings To Watch: Hormel Foods (HRL) Reports Q3 Results Tomorrow
feed.summary: Hormel Foods (HRL) is scheduled to release its Q3 results tomorrow, with analysts projecting a non-GAAP EPS of $0.39 and revenue of $2.91 billion. The article highlights the company's past earnings performance, its focus on brand strength and category leadership, and the impact of acquisitions and divestitures. Investors will be keen to see if HRL can exceed analyst expectations and how its strategic product innovations are contributing to growth.

feed.title: HPE broadly expands AI-native networking, hybrid cloud and storage offerings
feed.summary: HPE announced a significant expansion of its AI-native networking, hybrid cloud, and storage portfolios at Discover Barcelona 2025, integrating recently acquired Juniper Networks technologies. Key updates include new AI-optimized networking hardware, expanded AIOps features, and AI-ready storage solutions, all aimed at providing a consistent operational model for enterprise and cloud environments. The company also detailed strategic partnerships with Nvidia and AMD and introduced new financial services programs to support these advancements.
